title: Invitrogen Platinum II Taq Hot-Start PCR
description: Thermo Fisher Platinum II Taq Hot-Start DNA Polymerase: 50 uL reaction with a universal 60 C anneal and fast 68 C extension.

ingredients.name: Platinum II Taq Hot-Start DNA Polymerase

payload.notes: Vendor: Thermo Fisher Scientific (Invitrogen), Platinum II Taq Hot-Start DNA Polymerase (Cat. 14966001). Universal 60 C annealing works for most primers (recommended primer Tm ~60 C; the Platinum II buffer iso-stabilizes primer-template duplexes). The user guide cycling table has no separate final-extension step (goes straight to hold), so none is included here. Cycles 25-35. Extension 1 kb per 15 sec at 68 C. For >65% GC targets add Platinum GC Enhancer (10 uL/50 uL). A 2-step protocol (combined anneal/extend 60 C, 15 sec) suits simple amplicons up to 1 kb. AT-rich targets: anneal 44-60 C and add MgCl2 to ~2.5 mM. Reactions can be assembled at room temperature. Source: https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/BID/manuals/MAN0017534_Platinum_II_Taq_HS_DNA_Pol_UG.pdf
